backstory.original: As a member of Rivals of Waterdeep, Shaka is always looking for the latest adventure and the latest puzzle. His party has encountered mysteries and foes throughout Waterdeep, Candlekeep, Icewind Dale, and Avernus. Their base of operations is located in the Trollskull Manor in Waterdeep where a brain in a jar named Brian stands watch.
backstory.display: 作为深水城对手团的一员，沙卡总是在寻找最新的冒险和谜题。他的队伍在整个深水城、烛堡、冰风谷和阿弗纳斯都遇到过谜团和敌人。他们的行动基地位于深水城的巨魔头骨庄园，那里有个装在罐子里的大脑，名叫布莱恩，观察着一切。

description.original: A beam of crackling green shoots towards an enemy, dealing damage.
description.display: 向一名敌人发射一道绿色爆裂光束，造成伤害。

longDescription.original: A beam of crackling green shoots towards an enemy, dealing damage.
longDescription.display: 向一名敌人发射一道绿色爆裂光束，造成伤害。

animations.comment: for some reason the eldritch blast graphic origin point is in the center, so x here is 95+29=124

description.original: All enemies are pushed back and a wall of light appears in front of the formation for 15 seconds.
description.display: 所有敌人被击退，同时一面光墙出现在阵型前方，持续 15 秒。

longDescription.original: All enemies are pushed back slightly and then a wall of light appears slightly in front of the formation for 15 seconds. Enemies that pass through the wall of light take damage, are stunned for 5 seconds, and gain a white glow which causes them to miss with 75% of all attacks for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 所有敌人被稍微击退，同时一面光墙出现在阵型前方不远处，持续 15 秒。穿越光墙的敌人会受到伤害，并会被眩晕 5 秒。这些敌人脚下会出现一道炫目的白光。脚下有白光的敌人，全部攻击有 75% 几率落空，持续 30 秒。

description.desc: Shaka attempts to solve a celestial puzzle with the potential for great rewards. Four random slots in the formation are assigned a random tag. For each Champion in those slots that match the slot's tag, Shaka increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. A fifth slot is chosen but remains locked with an unknown tag until a specialization is chosen.
沙卡尝试解决一个天神谜题，意图从中获取奖励。阵型中的四个随机格子会被各自分配一个随机标记。格子中每有一位符合标记的勇士，沙卡就会提升所有勇士的伤害 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。在专精选定前，第五栏位被选定但以位置标签保持锁定。

tipText.original: Shaka solves a random puzzle on each adventure, buffing all Champions
tipText.display: 沙卡在每次冒险中解决一个随机谜题，使所有勇士得到强化

description.desc: Shaka adds $(amount___3) temporary health to the entire party when changing areas, and refreshes them every 10 seconds. The amount of hit points is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each A Celestial Puzzle slot that is filled properly, stacking additively.

effect_keys.comment: This effect key is just so we have a base amount for the description. Things that buff celestial resistance should also buff this key.

description.desc: 在改变区域时，沙卡赋予所有队伍成员 $(amount___3) 临时生命值，同时每 10 秒刷新整支队伍。每有一个天神谜题的格子被正确填充，生命值提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)，并以加算方式叠加。

effect_keys.comment: This effect key is just so we have a base amount for the description. Things that buff celestial resistance should also buff this key.

tipText.original: Shaka grants temporary hit points to all Champions as they change areas.
tipText.display: 沙卡在改变区域时使所有勇士获得临时的生命值。

description.desc: Shaka increases the base effect of A Celestial Puzzle by $(not_buffed amount)% for each properly filled puzzle slot he's adjacent to, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一个妥善填上的谜题格子与沙卡相邻，天神谜题的基本效果就会提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，并以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka focuses on hampering the attacks of enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡专注于阻挡敌人的攻击。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka focuses on destroying newly spawned enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡专注于消灭新出现的敌人。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Celestial Resistance by $amount%
天界抗力的效果提升 $amount%
The base effect of A Celestial Puzzle is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each other Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位其他的“深水城的竞争对手”勇士，“天神谜题”的基本效果即增加 $(not_buffed amount)%。以乘算方式堆叠。
The locked Celestial Puzzle slot in the formation is assigned the $(shaka_locked_tag easy) tag and can be matched to further buff the party.
阵型中出现的锁定“天神谜题”栏位会获得 $(shaka_locked_tag easy) 标签，将其正确填充可进一步增益队伍。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka focuses on an easy solution to the puzzle.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡专注于寻找谜题的简单解法。

description.desc: The locked Celestial Puzzle slot in the formation is assigned the $(shaka_locked_tag medium) tag and can be matched to further buff the party. The base effect of A Celestial Puzzle is increased by $amount%.
阵型中出现的锁定“天神谜题”栏位会获得 $(shaka_locked_tag medium) 标签，将其正确填充可进一步增益队伍。“天神谜题”的基本效果增加 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka looks to solve a more difficult version of the puzzle.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡期待解决更困难版本的谜题。

description.desc: The locked Celestial Puzzle slot in the formation is assigned the $(shaka_locked_tag hard) tag and can be matched to further buff the party. The base effect of A Celestial Puzzle is increased by $amount%.
阵型中出现的锁定“天神谜题”栏位会获得 $(shaka_locked_tag hard) 标签，将其正确填充可进一步增益队伍。“天神谜题”的基本效果增加 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka is interested in solving the most difficult version of the puzzle.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡兴趣满满，要解决最困难版本的谜题。

description.desc: The locked Celestial Puzzle slot remains locked, and instead Celestial Resistance is increased by $amount%.
未解锁天神谜题栏位保持未解锁，取而代之的是“天界抗力”提升 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Shaka likes the puzzle just how it is.
specializationDescription.display: 沙卡就是喜欢这个谜题的样子。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Celestial Resistance by $amount%
天界抗力的效果提升 $amount%
Increases the effect of Celestial Resistance by $amount%
天界抗力的效果提升 $amount%
Increases the effect of Celestial Resistance by $amount%
天界抗力的效果提升 $amount%

天界抗力的效果提升 $amount%
Increases the base effect of A Celestial Puzzle by $amount%
提升“天神谜题”的基本效果 $amount%

description.original: I've learned a lot in my time with the Rivals of Waterdeep.
description.display: 我以前待在深水城对手团时学习到了很多知识。

description.original: I don't know if I'd call me that, but you can if you want!
description.display: 我可不会这么自夸，但你要这样称呼我也行！

description.original: You never know when your home will be teleported to the Nine Hells.
description.display: 哪怕下一刻你自己的家被传送到九层地狱也要做好准备。

description.original: Once you see the threads connecting all the pieces, it's a piece of cake.
description.display: 只要你看清楚连接所有碎片的线，就一切都简单了。

description.original: She was there when I needed someone to trust in Avernus.
description.display: 我在阿弗纳斯无依无靠时碰上了她。

description.original: With all of us together, we should be able to solve this once and for all!
description.display: 大家同心协力，定能彻底解决！

description.original: On the edge of death, your choices narrow.
description.display: 在死亡边缘，你的选择很有限。

description.original: Ah now, this one's a challenge!
description.display: 啊，现在，这个是一个挑战!

effects.description: An additional slot in the formation is assigned a random tag and can be matched to further increase A Celestial Puzzle

description.original: This one will really throw them.
The answer you get may not be the answer you need.
description.display: 你获得的答案可能并非你需要。

description.original: There is far more to this than you might think.
How else can you solve a maze?
description.display: 不然还要怎么去解决迷宫呢？

character_sheet_details.backstory: As a member of Rivals of Waterdeep, Shaka is always looking for the latest adventure and the latest puzzle. His party has encountered mysteries and foes throughout Waterdeep, Candlekeep, Icewind Dale, and Avernus. Their base of operations is located in the Trollskull Manor in Waterdeep where a brain in a jar named Brian stands watch.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Shaka buffs all Champions based on the number of slots solved in his puzzle

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为深水城对手团的一员，沙卡总是在寻找最新的冒险和谜题。他的队伍在整个深水城、烛堡、冰风谷和阿弗纳斯都遇到过谜团和敌人。他们的行动基地位于深水城的巨魔头骨庄园，那里有个装在罐子里的大脑，名叫布莱恩，观察着一切。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 沙卡能够根据他已解决谜题的栏位给所有勇士提供增益。
